title: ScreenshotsMCP Audit Budget
description: Shared finding/perf thresholds used by both the VS Code extension's status-bar badge and the `screenshotsmcp check` CLI command.

maxFindingsPerUrl.description: Fail/flag when a single URL has more than this many findings.

maxTotalFindings.description: Fail/flag when total findings across all URLs exceed this.

warnThreshold.description: Status-bar badge background turns red at this finding count.

categories.description: Restrict counting to these audit categories (case-insensitive).
